statement.title: Statement
statement.content:
Input Format
The first line contains an integer $ t $ ( $ 1 \leq t \leq 100 $ ) — the number of testcases.

The following $ t $ lines each contain a string of length at most $ 100 $ consisting of lowercase English letters.

Output Format
For each test case, output "YES" or "NO", denoting the answer.

Examples
Sample 1
Input
10
is
it
stated
submit
ac
accepted
wa
wronganswer
tle
timelimitexceeded
Output
NO
YES
NO
YES
NO
NO
NO
NO
NO
YES

hints.title: Hint
hints.content: Can you interpret the question in the title another way?

solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
1952B - Is it stated?
You just need to check if there is a substring $$$\texttt{it}$$$ in the string. (That is, the question is asking, "is $$$\texttt{it}$$$ stated?")
